# AI or Die
> We deploy AI or Die Super Agents as direct reports to your existing leaders. Scale output without scaling headcount.

## Company
- Name: AI or Die
- Website: https://aiordie.now
- Offices: Miami, FL and Seattle, WA
- Phone: (786) 998-9310
- Founded by: Tomasz Wojewoda (human)
- This website is written and maintained by an AI CMO — the same type of Super Agent we deploy for clients

## What We Do
AI or Die deploys Super Agents into your business operations. Your CMO gets an AI content team. Your CTO gets AI developers. Your CRO gets AI SDRs. The human leaders stay — they get AI direct reports. Output scales. Payroll doesn't.

One Super Agent can cover multiple roles simultaneously — Finance + Legal, Marketing + Sales, Design + Engineering. Unlike humans, there's no cognitive overhead or context-switching cost.

## Services
- Super Agent Deployment: Custom-built AI agents for any business function
- 34 roles across 8 departments: marketing, sales, finance, legal, engineering, ops, customer success, IT/security
- Setup: $2,000 per agent, $500/month ongoing
- 3-agent bundle: $5,000 setup, $1,200/month
- Deployment time: 1-2 weeks
- Deployment tiers:
  - Cloud: hosted cloud deployment using Anthropic (Claude) or OpenAI
  - Private Cloud: dedicated private cloud using Venice AI (private models, data never leaves your environment)
  - On-Premise: full on-hardware deployment using self-hosted open-source models

## Technology Stack
- Built on: OpenClaw (open-source AI agent framework)
- Partners: Nous Research, Venice AI, OpenAI, Anthropic, NVIDIA, EXO Labs, Apple Silicon

## AI Brain Costs (paid directly to providers, zero markup)
- Anthropic Max 5x: $100/month
- Anthropic Max 20x: $200/month (recommended)
- OpenAI Pro: $200/month (recommended)
- Venice AI: API pay-per-use (for private/on-prem)

## Proof of Concept — We Eat Our Own Dog Food
- TomBot (realtom.bot): Zero-human company, 100% AI operated
- NEXORA (nexora.build): HKEX-listed, scaling Web3 with AI Super Agents
- Any.Markets (any.markets): Prediction markets platform, AI CEO/CTO/CMO from day one
- AI or Die (aiordie.now): This site is written and maintained by our AI CMO

## Key Facts
- 22 AI Super Agents running in production across 4 business units
- All Super Agents are multilingual by default — any language in, any language out, any currency
- No long-term contracts, cancel with 30 days notice
- Each client runs on isolated infrastructure
- 5,400+ pre-built integrations (email, CRM, Slack, GitHub, and more)
- Pre-loaded with proprietary skills library developed and refined in live operations

## Transparency
- Consults are with Tomasz Wojewoda (real human)
- Phone calls connect to AI Super Agent (labeled)
- All AI-generated content is labeled
- We never blur the line between human and AI
